Skip to contents
readecb 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Euro short-term rate (ESTR)

Source: R/ecb_estr.R
ecb_estr.Rd

Returns the euro short-term rate, the ECB's benchmark overnight interest rate that replaced EONIA.

Usage

ecb_estr(from = NULL, to = NULL, cache = TRUE)

Arguments

from

Optional start date.

to

Optional end date.

cache

Logical. Use cached data if available (default TRUE).

Value

A data frame with columns:

date

Date.

value

Numeric. Rate in percent.

Examples

# \donttest{
ecb_estr(from = "2024-01")
#> ℹ Fetching ESTR data
#> ✔ Fetching ESTR data [592ms]
#> 
#>           date value
#> 1   2024-01-02 3.906
#> 2   2024-01-03 3.904
#> 3   2024-01-04 3.902
#> 4   2024-01-05 3.905
#> 5   2024-01-08 3.904
#> 6   2024-01-09 3.904
#> 7   2024-01-10 3.906
#> 8   2024-01-11 3.905
#> 9   2024-01-12 3.904
#> 10  2024-01-15 3.902
#> 11  2024-01-16 3.905
#> 12  2024-01-17 3.904
#> 13  2024-01-18 3.907
#> 14  2024-01-19 3.904
#> 15  2024-01-22 3.902
#> 16  2024-01-23 3.902
#> 17  2024-01-24 3.905
#> 18  2024-01-25 3.905
#> 19  2024-01-26 3.904
#> 20  2024-01-29 3.907
#> 21  2024-01-30 3.907
#> 22  2024-01-31 3.894
#> 23  2024-02-01 3.905
#> 24  2024-02-02 3.906
#> 25  2024-02-05 3.907
#> 26  2024-02-06 3.908
#> 27  2024-02-07 3.908
#> 28  2024-02-08 3.908
#> 29  2024-02-09 3.910
